narrative:
Greenfield Twp township has 4,052 registered voters, with 48.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.3 percentage points.
